title: Hulikal Ghat Landslide: Three Dead, Three Seriously Injured During Road Work in Karnataka's Shivamogga
description: In Shivamogga, Karnataka, a landslide at a road construction site in Hulikal Ghat resulted in the deaths of three workers and serious injuries to three others. The incident occurred while they constructed a concrete retaining wall near a sharp bend by the Chandikamba Temple.
